hero_description: This system analyzes cattle images for Foot-and-Mouth Disease (FMD) symptoms using artificial intelligence. It automatically detects lesions in the mouth, hooves, and head regions, providing decision support for veterinarians.
upload_drag: Drag and drop an image or click to select
analyzing_subtitle: AI is examining the image, please wait...
demo_description: Select one of the example images to test the system.
caution_text: ⚠ WARNING: This system is for decision support only. Final diagnosis must be confirmed by a veterinarian.
error_upload: An error occurred while uploading the file.
error_inference: An error occurred during analysis. Please try again.
error_network: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection.
error_file_type: Unsupported file type. Please upload a JPG, JPEG, or PNG file.
error_file_size: File size too large. Maximum 10MB is supported.
footer_disclaimer: This application is not a veterinary diagnostic tool.
